TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Katatelekan romi'ad i San Francisco == Kalaloodan saka tosa no hekal itiya i, lekapotan sofitay kinatosa mihapiw to pakayniay saki Taywan a paenaran a tilid, halo 1943 miheca 12 folad 1 romi'ad a pasinpon pihapiw, awaayay ko kacingangan a "Cairo ratoh" ato 1945 miheca 7 folad 26 romi'ad nai congtong no Amilika ci Truman, Conghuaminko safo kakeridan ci Chiang Kai-shek ato Inkiris kitakit kakeridan ci Churchill panganganay pihapiw to "Potsdam ratoh", o natosaay saheto laloma'ay no satelek no Conghuaminko pidoedoan no likisi paini to naikoran no lalood to aicowa ko paenaran no Taywan a "so'elinay sapaco'of", o nianan ko sasowalen to parana'an no Conghuaminko sapikowan to Taywan. ​Nikawrira, onini a Cairo ratoh a "Ratoh" a sowal, malecaday o kasasowal to "pangiha" kasasowalan, i pina'angan to tilid maparocek o "sinpon a sowal" (press communiqué) sanay aca a nengnengen. Oya "Potsdam ratoh" sanay a patodongan tilid o "pihapiw" sanay aca ko paini, o natosaay awaay ko todong no telek paecasan. ​​Sa'elinay, patatekoen ko 'ayaway a kasakitakit, mangalef o lekapotan sofitay a kakeridan sapi Dipong a katapi'an ko tatodong sapaini a pidemak, pangiha ano eca pihapiw, awaay ko kacitodong to 'icel no sarikec, o "Katatelekan i San Francisco" ta ira ko so'elinay i no kasakitakit pidemak a sasowalen. Awaay ho ko piketon to paenaran no Taywan a ponka ​I 1950 miheca, o pisatao' no Amilika to Taywan ira ko makalimay a kafalic. Padoedo o kakeridan no kitakit mihapiw i 1949 miheca 8 folad mihapiw to "sapitao' to sakiconghua a tilidan" itiya, i 1950 miheca 1 folad 5 romi'ad, pacecay haca mihapiw ko congtong no Amilika ci Truman to salaloma'an no Congko a kacowat to "pakonira" (hand-off) a satao'. ​​I 1950 miheca 6 folad 25 romi'ad micowat ko kalalood no Dipong ato Koria, ci Truman i 27 romi'ad micering to sofatay saka 7 tamina sakapot micomod i malalaed to Taywan, mitena' to sapiloodaw no Congko kongcantang to Taywan, nanoya milongoc to Conghuaminko sifo akaa pilood to Congko, saka malapatenokan to ko malalaed to Taywan. ​​​O sakasongila' pihamon ko sofitay no Amilika, midotoc to serikec no kasakitakit ci Truman, pakafana' to "ikor a paenaran no Taywan, itiya to patiyol to i kanga'ayan no Taypinyang, ato mapatireng to katatelek kanga'ayan to Dipong, ano eca ikor no pitelek no Linhoko, itiya sato misapinang." ​​​​O "pihapiw to patenokan to ko malalaed to Taywan" ni Truman, dengan o kafalic no satao' no Amiklika, o awaayay ko pisaheci no rikec no kasakitakit saki paenaran no Taywan a pihapiw koni. roma to a sowal, o pihapiw ni Truman caay ko pili'ayaw to eca ho ka songila' ko paenaran no Taywan, o sapinayar to kasasowalan koni. Katatelekan i San Francisco ​Tangasa 1951 miheca 9 folad 8 romi'ad, ira ko 48 kasalekapot kitakit (caay ka sa'osi ko Conghuaminko ato patireng hananay ho a Conghuarenmin kongheko) ato Dipong i piharatengan kalalood ikiing i San Francisco no Amilika, kasasowalen "Katatelekan i San Francisco". Salaloma'an no katatelek dengan o pisaheci to naikoran no lalood to saki Dipong a paenaran no sici ato kacitodong no kalaloodan, masowal aca ko nano Dipong a sera to Taywan, Penho ato Korea o aicowaen ko citodongay sanay. ​​"Katatelekan i San Francisco" saka 2 cefang paseraan saka 2 liyad saka 2 tosir, mahapinang matelek: "o pisawad no Dipong to Taywan ato Penho a kanatal to salongoc, kacitodong ato sasaali." Pakayni tonini a saliyad misetek to piliyas no Tywan to Dipong a sakowan a paenaran rikec, nika o saliyad caay kasaheci ikor no pisawad no Dipong to Taywan Penho i, o aicowa to ko citodongay salongoc no Taywan Penho, o nianan ko kasasowalen to saki "caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan" o sanay no syakay i kasakitakit, ikor sato paini ko Amilika o paenaran no Taywan o Taywan a tamdaw ko miketonay to nikapolongan ko sapitelek saan. ​​​Masamatira konian, talacowa o "Katatelekan i San Francisco" itiniay i 26 liyad matelek ikor no Conghuaminko ato Dipong a katelekan ko pidotocan, nika mapalasawad ko Conghuaminko ato Dipong a katelekan, mapalalan ko papotalay sakacisalongoc to saki "Katatelekan i San Francisco" noni. ​​​​Onini a liyad a matelek: "ano Dipong ato roma kitakit ko patirengay to kasatelek ano eca saki kasatelek i kalalood a misaali, kasatelekan o mamiharateng to sakanga'ay nonini kitakit ko pitelekan, onini a sakanga'ay o milekoay to sakapiraoy no kitakit a satelek." Roma a sowal, ano Conghuaminko ato Dipong masateked a masasitelek i, maala pihayda no Dipong to kalaseraan, saka o kinaira nonini o mipolongay i satelek citodong i "Katatelekan i San Francisco" miraoy to pakaloiday a kitakit. O kakusa no kasakitakit rikec miliyang to Conghuaminko kacitodong salongoc to Taywan ​Talacowa ono Conghuaminko ko Taywan saan to ko tamdamdaw, nika minengneng to kasakitakit rikec, misawad to nai "Cairo ratoh" ato "Potsdam ratoh" a kasasowal, pasi "Katatelekan i San Francisco" ko parena'an mipaini to pakayraan sasowalen, nawhani caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan, mitifac pasowal midotoc "mili'ayaw micalap" patedo kakawa ato "romi'adan" patedo kakawa, ono todong no Conghua minko ko Taywan sato. Asimanay a sowal, halafin to ko picalap, awaay to miliyangay, orasaka o no makoay to sanay. Sa'elinay to o pipadoedo no Conghuaminko sifo mikowan to Taywan, orasaka ira ko nano mako ko salongoc no Ttaywan o sanay. Kalaliyangan koni, o sasowalen no Conghuaminko koni, caay awaay pipatalahekal pihayda no kasakitakit, caay aca ka tatodong i harateng salongoc no finawlan. ​​O kakusa no kasakitakit rikec ca Peng Mingmin aci Huang Zhaotang, itiya aca i 1970 miheca pakayni "mili'ayaw micalap" patedo kakawa ato "romi'adan" patedo kakawa a sasowalen, sahacecay sa a miliyang. Patoro' a mieses, nai 1952 miheca o Conghuaminko pasi Taywan, Penho "mili'ayaw micalap" o aitira i papotal no Taywan, Penho ko kacisalongoc no kitakit, nika o kaitira no Conghuaminko i Congko madotoc to no Conghuarenmin konheko itiya, kaira no Conghuaminko oya malafelay(mapatayay) a sifo, orasaka miliyang to kacitodong no Conghuaminko to salongoc to Taywan. ​​​Caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan, o pahapinang to pipatedo no Congko paini to sasowalen o todong no Congko ko Taywan sanay, o paenaran ato salongoc no Taywan, o niyah finawlan no Taywan ko miketonay. ​​​​Mikawitay: Lin Zhihong (Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay citodongay) (編纂:林志鴻 )
S.PHON: == katatəɾəkan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i san franʦisʦo~u == kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan saka to~usa no~u ħəkaɾ itija i, ɾəkapo~utan so~ufitaj kinato~usa miħapiw to~u pakajniaj saki tajwan a paənaran a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a pasinpo~un piħapiw, awaajaj ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan a "ʦairo~u rato~uħ" ato~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ nai ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u safo~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ato~u inkiris kitakit kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħo~u~urʦħiɾɾ paŋaŋanaj piħapiw to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ", o~u nato~usaaj saħəto~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u satəɾək no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u ɾikisi paini to~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u aiʦo~uwa ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan a "so~uʡəɾinaj sapaʦo~uʡo~uf", o~u nianan ko~u saso~uwaɾən to~u paranaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sapiko~uwan to~u tajwan. *nikawrira, o~unini a ʦairo~u rato~uħ a "rato~uħ" a so~uwaɾ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u kasaso~uwaɾ to~u "paŋiħa" kasaso~uwaɾan, i pinaʡaŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ maparo~uʦək o~u "sinpo~un a so~uwaɾ" (prəss ʦo~ummo~u~uni*o~u~u*) sanaj aʦa a nəŋnəŋən. o~uja "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ" sanaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u "piħapiw" sanaj aʦa ko~u paini, o~u nato~usaaj awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u təɾək paəʦasan. **saʡəɾinaj, patatəko~uən ko~u ʡajawaj a kasakitakit, maŋaɾəf o~u ɾəkapo~utan so~ufitaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan sapi ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katapiʡan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sapaini a piɬ~ɮəmak, paŋiħa ano~u əʦa piħapiw, awaaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u sarikəʦ, o~u "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" ta ira ko~u so~uʡəɾinaj i no~u kasakitakit piɬ~ɮəmak a saso~uwaɾən. awaaj ħo~u ko~u pikəto~un to~u paənaran no~u tajwan a po~unka *i **** miħəʦa, o~u pisatao~uʡ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan ira ko~u makaɾimaj a kafaɾiʦ. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit miħapiw i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u "sapitao~uʡ to~u sakiʦo~uŋħo~u~ua a tiɾiɬ~ɮan" itija, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, paʦəʦaj ħaʦa miħapiw ko~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman to~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u a kaʦo~uwat to~u "pako~unira" (ħanɬ~ɮ-o~uff) a satao~uʡ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miʦo~uwat ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ko~uria, ʦi tro~u~uman i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miʦəriŋ to~u so~ufataj saka * tamina sakapo~ut miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan, mitənaʡ to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~uŋʦantaŋ to~u tajwan, nano~uja miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u akaa piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, saka maɾapatəno~ukan to~u ko~u maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan. ***o~u sakaso~uŋiɾaʡ piħamo~un ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u sərikəʦ no~u kasakitakit ʦi tro~u~uman, pakafanaʡ to~u "iko~ur a paənaran no~u tajwan, itija to~u patijo~uɾ to~u i kaŋaʡajan no~u tajpinjaŋ, ato~u mapatirəŋ to~u katatəɾək kaŋaʡajan to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, ano~u əʦa iko~ur no~u pitəɾək no~u ɾinħo~uko~u, itija sato~u misapinaŋ." ****o~u "piħapiw to~u patəno~ukan to~u ko~u maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan" ni tro~u~uman, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafaɾiʦ no~u satao~uʡ no~u amikɾika, o~u awaajaj ko~u pisaħəʦi no~u rikəʦ no~u kasakitakit saki paənaran no~u tajwan a piħapiw ko~uni. ro~uma to~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u piħapiw ni tro~u~uman ʦaaj ko~u piɾiʡajaw to~u əʦa ħo~u ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, o~u sapinajar to~u kasaso~uwaɾan ko~uni. katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u *taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ** kasaɾəkapo~ut kitakit (ʦaaj ka saʡo~usi ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u patirəŋ ħananaj ħo~u a ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin ko~uŋħəko~u) ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i piħaratəŋan kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ikiiŋ i san franʦisʦo~u no~u amiɾika, kasaso~uwaɾən "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u". saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u katatəɾək ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pisaħəʦi to~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u saki ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a paənaran no~u siʦi ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, maso~uwaɾ aʦa ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a səra to~u tajwan, pənħo~u ato~u ko~urəa o~u aiʦo~uwaən ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sanaj. **"katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" saka * ʦəfaŋ pasəraan saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir, maħapinaŋ matəɾək: "o~u pisawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u a kanataɾ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ato~u sasaaɾi." pakajni to~unini a saɾijaɬ~ɮ misətək to~u piɾijas no~u tjwan to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sako~uwan a paənaran rikəʦ, nika o~u saɾijaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj kasaħəʦi iko~ur no~u pisawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan pənħo~u i, o~u aiʦo~uwa to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan pənħo~u, o~u nianan ko~u kasaso~uwaɾən to~u saki "ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan" o~u sanaj no~u sjakaj i kasakitakit, iko~ur sato~u paini ko~u amiɾika o~u paənaran no~u tajwan o~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mikəto~unaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u sapitəɾək saan. ***masamatira ko~unian, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" itiniaj i ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ matəɾək iko~ur no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katəɾəkan ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan, nika mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katəɾəkan, mapaɾaɾan ko~u papo~utaɾaj sakaʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saki "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" no~uni. ****o~unini a ɾijaɬ~ɮ a matəɾək: "ano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ro~uma kitakit ko~u patirəŋaj to~u kasatəɾək ano~u əʦa saki kasatəɾək i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a misaaɾi, kasatəɾəkan o~u mamiħaratəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~unini kitakit ko~u pitəɾəkan, o~unini a sakaŋaʡaj o~u miɾəko~uaj to~u sakapirao~uj no~u kitakit a satəɾək." ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, ano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ masatəkəɬ~ɮ a masasitəɾək i, maaɾa piħajɬ~ɮa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kaɾasəraan, saka o~u kinaira no~unini o~u mipo~uɾo~uŋaj i satəɾək ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" mirao~uj to~u pakaɾo~uiɬ~ɮaj a kitakit. o~u kako~u~usa no~u kasakitakit rikəʦ miɾijaŋ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u tajwan *taɾaʦo~uwa o~uno~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~u tajwan saan to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, nika minəŋnəŋ to~u kasakitakit rikəʦ, misawaɬ~ɮ to~u nai "ʦairo~u rato~uħ" ato~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ" a kasaso~uwaɾ, pasi "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" ko~u parənaʡan mipaini to~u pakajraan saso~uwaɾən, nawħani ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, mitifaʦ paso~uwaɾ miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa ato~u "ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa, o~uno~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u ko~u tajwan sato~u. asimanaj a so~uwaɾ, ħaɾafin to~u ko~u piʦaɾap, awaaj to~u miɾijaŋaj, o~urasaka o~u no~u mako~uaj to~u sanaj. saʡəɾinaj to~u o~u pipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u miko~uwan to~u tajwan, o~urasaka ira ko~u nano~u mako~u ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u ttajwan o~u sanaj. kaɾaɾijaŋan ko~uni, o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~uni, ʦaaj awaaj pipataɾaħəkaɾ piħajɬ~ɮa no~u kasakitakit, ʦaaj aʦa ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i ħaratəŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan. **o~u kako~u~usa no~u kasakitakit rikəʦ ʦa pəŋ miŋmin aʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~utaŋ, itija aʦa i **** miħəʦa pakajni "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa ato~u "ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa a saso~uwaɾən, saħaʦəʦaj sa a miɾijaŋ. pato~uro~uʡ a miəsəs, nai **** miħəʦa o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u pasi tajwan, pənħo~u "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" o~u aitira i papo~utaɾ no~u tajwan, pənħo~u ko~u kaʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kitakit, nika o~u kaitira no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i ʦo~uŋko~u maɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin ko~unħəko~u itija, kaira no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u o~uja maɾafəɾaj(mapatajaj) a sifo~u, o~urasaka miɾijaŋ to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u tajwan. ***ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u pipatəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦo~uŋko~u paini to~u saso~uwaɾən o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u tajwan sanaj, o~u paənaran ato~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan, o~u nijaħ finawɾan no~u tajwan ko~u mikəto~unaj. ****mikawitaj: ɾin *ħiħo~uŋ (sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj) (**:*** )
S.FORM: == Katatelekan romi'ad i San Francisco == Kalaloodan saka tosa no hekal itiya i, lekapotan sofitay kinatosa mihapiw to pakayniay saki Taywan a paenaran a tilid, halo 1943 miheca 12 folad 1 romi'ad a pasinpon pihapiw, awaayay ko kacingangan a "Cairo ratoh" ato 1945 miheca 7 folad 26 romi'ad nai congtong no Amilika ci Truman, Conghuaminko safo kakeridan ci Chiang Kai-shek ato Inkiris kitakit kakeridan ci Churchill panganganay pihapiw to "Potsdam ratoh", o natosaay saheto laloma'ay no satelek no Conghuaminko pidoedoan no likisi paini to naikoran no lalood to aicowa ko paenaran no Taywan a "so'elinay sapaco'of", o nianan ko sasowalen to parana'an no Conghuaminko sapikowan to Taywan. ​Nikawrira, onini a Cairo ratoh a "Ratoh" a sowal, malecaday o kasasowal to "pangiha" kasasowalan, i pina'angan to tilid maparocek o "sinpon a sowal" (press communiqué) sanay aca a nengnengen. Oya "Potsdam ratoh" sanay a patodongan tilid o "pihapiw" sanay aca ko paini, o natosaay awaay ko todong no telek paecasan. ​​Sa'elinay, patatekoen ko 'ayaway a kasakitakit, mangalef o lekapotan sofitay a kakeridan sapi Dipong a katapi'an ko tatodong sapaini a pidemak, pangiha ano eca pihapiw, awaay ko kacitodong to 'icel no sarikec, o "Katatelekan i San Francisco" ta ira ko so'elinay i no kasakitakit pidemak a sasowalen. Awaay ho ko piketon to paenaran no Taywan a ponka ​I 1950 miheca, o pisatao' no Amilika to Taywan ira ko makalimay a kafalic. Padoedo o kakeridan no kitakit mihapiw i 1949 miheca 8 folad mihapiw to "sapitao' to sakiconghua a tilidan" itiya, i 1950 miheca 1 folad 5 romi'ad, pacecay haca mihapiw ko congtong no Amilika ci Truman to salaloma'an no Congko a kacowat to "pakonira" (hand-off) a satao'. ​​I 1950 miheca 6 folad 25 romi'ad micowat ko kalalood no Dipong ato Koria, ci Truman i 27 romi'ad micering to sofatay saka 7 tamina sakapot micomod i malalaed to Taywan, mitena' to sapiloodaw no Congko kongcantang to Taywan, nanoya milongoc to Conghuaminko sifo akaa pilood to Congko, saka malapatenokan to ko malalaed to Taywan. ​​​O sakasongila' pihamon ko sofitay no Amilika, midotoc to serikec no kasakitakit ci Truman, pakafana' to "ikor a paenaran no Taywan, itiya to patiyol to i kanga'ayan no Taypinyang, ato mapatireng to katatelek kanga'ayan to Dipong, ano eca ikor no pitelek no Linhoko, itiya sato misapinang." ​​​​O "pihapiw to patenokan to ko malalaed to Taywan" ni Truman, dengan o kafalic no satao' no Amiklika, o awaayay ko pisaheci no rikec no kasakitakit saki paenaran no Taywan a pihapiw koni. roma to a sowal, o pihapiw ni Truman caay ko pili'ayaw to eca ho ka songila' ko paenaran no Taywan, o sapinayar to kasasowalan koni. Katatelekan i San Francisco ​Tangasa 1951 miheca 9 folad 8 romi'ad, ira ko 48 kasalekapot kitakit (caay ka sa'osi ko Conghuaminko ato patireng hananay ho a Conghuarenmin kongheko) ato Dipong i piharatengan kalalood ikiing i San Francisco no Amilika, kasasowalen "Katatelekan i San Francisco". Salaloma'an no katatelek dengan o pisaheci to naikoran no lalood to saki Dipong a paenaran no sici ato kacitodong no kalaloodan, masowal aca ko nano Dipong a sera to Taywan, Penho ato Korea o aicowaen ko citodongay sanay. ​​"Katatelekan i San Francisco" saka 2 cefang paseraan saka 2 liyad saka 2 tosir, mahapinang matelek: "o pisawad no Dipong to Taywan ato Penho a kanatal to salongoc, kacitodong ato sasaali." Pakayni tonini a saliyad misetek to piliyas no Tywan to Dipong a sakowan a paenaran rikec, nika o saliyad caay kasaheci ikor no pisawad no Dipong to Taywan Penho i, o aicowa to ko citodongay salongoc no Taywan Penho, o nianan ko kasasowalen to saki "caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan" o sanay no syakay i kasakitakit, ikor sato paini ko Amilika o paenaran no Taywan o Taywan a tamdaw ko miketonay to nikapolongan ko sapitelek saan. ​​​Masamatira konian, talacowa o "Katatelekan i San Francisco" itiniay i 26 liyad matelek ikor no Conghuaminko ato Dipong a katelekan ko pidotocan, nika mapalasawad ko Conghuaminko ato Dipong a katelekan, mapalalan ko papotalay sakacisalongoc to saki "Katatelekan i San Francisco" noni. ​​​​Onini a liyad a matelek: "ano Dipong ato roma kitakit ko patirengay to kasatelek ano eca saki kasatelek i kalalood a misaali, kasatelekan o mamiharateng to sakanga'ay nonini kitakit ko pitelekan, onini a sakanga'ay o milekoay to sakapiraoy no kitakit a satelek." Roma a sowal, ano Conghuaminko ato Dipong masateked a masasitelek i, maala pihayda no Dipong to kalaseraan, saka o kinaira nonini o mipolongay i satelek citodong i "Katatelekan i San Francisco" miraoy to pakaloiday a kitakit. O kakusa no kasakitakit rikec miliyang to Conghuaminko kacitodong salongoc to Taywan ​Talacowa ono Conghuaminko ko Taywan saan to ko tamdamdaw, nika minengneng to kasakitakit rikec, misawad to nai "Cairo ratoh" ato "Potsdam ratoh" a kasasowal, pasi "Katatelekan i San Francisco" ko parena'an mipaini to pakayraan sasowalen, nawhani caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan, mitifac pasowal midotoc "mili'ayaw micalap" patedo kakawa ato "romi'adan" patedo kakawa, ono todong no Conghua minko ko Taywan sato. Asimanay a sowal, halafin to ko picalap, awaay to miliyangay, orasaka o no makoay to sanay. Sa'elinay to o pipadoedo no Conghuaminko sifo mikowan to Taywan, orasaka ira ko nano mako ko salongoc no Ttaywan o sanay. Kalaliyangan koni, o sasowalen no Conghuaminko koni, caay awaay pipatalahekal pihayda no kasakitakit, caay aca ka tatodong i harateng salongoc no finawlan. ​​O kakusa no kasakitakit rikec ca Peng Mingmin aci Huang Zhaotang, itiya aca i 1970 miheca pakayni "mili'ayaw micalap" patedo kakawa ato "romi'adan" patedo kakawa a sasowalen, sahacecay sa a miliyang. Patoro' a mieses, nai 1952 miheca o Conghuaminko pasi Taywan, Penho "mili'ayaw micalap" o aitira i papotal no Taywan, Penho ko kacisalongoc no kitakit, nika o kaitira no Conghuaminko i Congko madotoc to no Conghuarenmin konheko itiya, kaira no Conghuaminko oya malafelay(mapatayay) a sifo, orasaka miliyang to kacitodong no Conghuaminko to salongoc to Taywan. ​​​Caayho kasetek ko paenaran no Taywan, o pahapinang to pipatedo no Congko paini to sasowalen o todong no Congko ko Taywan sanay, o paenaran ato salongoc no Taywan, o niyah finawlan no Taywan ko miketonay. ​​​​Mikawitay: Lin Zhihong (Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay citodongay) (編纂:林志鴻 )
S.PHON: == katatəɾəkan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i san franʦisʦo~u == kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan saka to~usa no~u ħəkaɾ itija i, ɾəkapo~utan so~ufitaj kinato~usa miħapiw to~u pakajniaj saki tajwan a paənaran a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a pasinpo~un piħapiw, awaajaj ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan a "ʦairo~u rato~uħ" ato~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ nai ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u safo~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ato~u inkiris kitakit kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħo~u~urʦħiɾɾ paŋaŋanaj piħapiw to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ", o~u nato~usaaj saħəto~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u satəɾək no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u ɾikisi paini to~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u aiʦo~uwa ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan a "so~uʡəɾinaj sapaʦo~uʡo~uf", o~u nianan ko~u saso~uwaɾən to~u paranaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sapiko~uwan to~u tajwan. *nikawrira, o~unini a ʦairo~u rato~uħ a "rato~uħ" a so~uwaɾ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u kasaso~uwaɾ to~u "paŋiħa" kasaso~uwaɾan, i pinaʡaŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ maparo~uʦək o~u "sinpo~un a so~uwaɾ" (prəss ʦo~ummo~u~uni*o~u~u*) sanaj aʦa a nəŋnəŋən. o~uja "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ" sanaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u "piħapiw" sanaj aʦa ko~u paini, o~u nato~usaaj awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u təɾək paəʦasan. **saʡəɾinaj, patatəko~uən ko~u ʡajawaj a kasakitakit, maŋaɾəf o~u ɾəkapo~utan so~ufitaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan sapi ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katapiʡan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sapaini a piɬ~ɮəmak, paŋiħa ano~u əʦa piħapiw, awaaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u sarikəʦ, o~u "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" ta ira ko~u so~uʡəɾinaj i no~u kasakitakit piɬ~ɮəmak a saso~uwaɾən. awaaj ħo~u ko~u pikəto~un to~u paənaran no~u tajwan a po~unka *i **** miħəʦa, o~u pisatao~uʡ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan ira ko~u makaɾimaj a kafaɾiʦ. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit miħapiw i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u "sapitao~uʡ to~u sakiʦo~uŋħo~u~ua a tiɾiɬ~ɮan" itija, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, paʦəʦaj ħaʦa miħapiw ko~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman to~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u a kaʦo~uwat to~u "pako~unira" (ħanɬ~ɮ-o~uff) a satao~uʡ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miʦo~uwat ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ko~uria, ʦi tro~u~uman i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miʦəriŋ to~u so~ufataj saka * tamina sakapo~ut miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan, mitənaʡ to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~uŋʦantaŋ to~u tajwan, nano~uja miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u akaa piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, saka maɾapatəno~ukan to~u ko~u maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan. ***o~u sakaso~uŋiɾaʡ piħamo~un ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u sərikəʦ no~u kasakitakit ʦi tro~u~uman, pakafanaʡ to~u "iko~ur a paənaran no~u tajwan, itija to~u patijo~uɾ to~u i kaŋaʡajan no~u tajpinjaŋ, ato~u mapatirəŋ to~u katatəɾək kaŋaʡajan to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, ano~u əʦa iko~ur no~u pitəɾək no~u ɾinħo~uko~u, itija sato~u misapinaŋ." ****o~u "piħapiw to~u patəno~ukan to~u ko~u maɾaɾaəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan" ni tro~u~uman, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafaɾiʦ no~u satao~uʡ no~u amikɾika, o~u awaajaj ko~u pisaħəʦi no~u rikəʦ no~u kasakitakit saki paənaran no~u tajwan a piħapiw ko~uni. ro~uma to~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u piħapiw ni tro~u~uman ʦaaj ko~u piɾiʡajaw to~u əʦa ħo~u ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, o~u sapinajar to~u kasaso~uwaɾan ko~uni. katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u *taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ** kasaɾəkapo~ut kitakit (ʦaaj ka saʡo~usi ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u patirəŋ ħananaj ħo~u a ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin ko~uŋħəko~u) ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i piħaratəŋan kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ikiiŋ i san franʦisʦo~u no~u amiɾika, kasaso~uwaɾən "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u". saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u katatəɾək ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pisaħəʦi to~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u saki ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a paənaran no~u siʦi ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, maso~uwaɾ aʦa ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a səra to~u tajwan, pənħo~u ato~u ko~urəa o~u aiʦo~uwaən ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sanaj. **"katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" saka * ʦəfaŋ pasəraan saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir, maħapinaŋ matəɾək: "o~u pisawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u a kanataɾ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ato~u sasaaɾi." pakajni to~unini a saɾijaɬ~ɮ misətək to~u piɾijas no~u tjwan to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sako~uwan a paənaran rikəʦ, nika o~u saɾijaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj kasaħəʦi iko~ur no~u pisawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan pənħo~u i, o~u aiʦo~uwa to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan pənħo~u, o~u nianan ko~u kasaso~uwaɾən to~u saki "ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan" o~u sanaj no~u sjakaj i kasakitakit, iko~ur sato~u paini ko~u amiɾika o~u paənaran no~u tajwan o~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mikəto~unaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u sapitəɾək saan. ***masamatira ko~unian, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" itiniaj i ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ matəɾək iko~ur no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katəɾəkan ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan, nika mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a katəɾəkan, mapaɾaɾan ko~u papo~utaɾaj sakaʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saki "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" no~uni. ****o~unini a ɾijaɬ~ɮ a matəɾək: "ano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ro~uma kitakit ko~u patirəŋaj to~u kasatəɾək ano~u əʦa saki kasatəɾək i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a misaaɾi, kasatəɾəkan o~u mamiħaratəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~unini kitakit ko~u pitəɾəkan, o~unini a sakaŋaʡaj o~u miɾəko~uaj to~u sakapirao~uj no~u kitakit a satəɾək." ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, ano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ masatəkəɬ~ɮ a masasitəɾək i, maaɾa piħajɬ~ɮa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kaɾasəraan, saka o~u kinaira no~unini o~u mipo~uɾo~uŋaj i satəɾək ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" mirao~uj to~u pakaɾo~uiɬ~ɮaj a kitakit. o~u kako~u~usa no~u kasakitakit rikəʦ miɾijaŋ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u tajwan *taɾaʦo~uwa o~uno~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~u tajwan saan to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, nika minəŋnəŋ to~u kasakitakit rikəʦ, misawaɬ~ɮ to~u nai "ʦairo~u rato~uħ" ato~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam rato~uħ" a kasaso~uwaɾ, pasi "katatəɾəkan i san franʦisʦo~u" ko~u parənaʡan mipaini to~u pakajraan saso~uwaɾən, nawħani ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, mitifaʦ paso~uwaɾ miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa ato~u "ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa, o~uno~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u ko~u tajwan sato~u. asimanaj a so~uwaɾ, ħaɾafin to~u ko~u piʦaɾap, awaaj to~u miɾijaŋaj, o~urasaka o~u no~u mako~uaj to~u sanaj. saʡəɾinaj to~u o~u pipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u miko~uwan to~u tajwan, o~urasaka ira ko~u nano~u mako~u ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u ttajwan o~u sanaj. kaɾaɾijaŋan ko~uni, o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~uni, ʦaaj awaaj pipataɾaħəkaɾ piħajɬ~ɮa no~u kasakitakit, ʦaaj aʦa ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i ħaratəŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan. **o~u kako~u~usa no~u kasakitakit rikəʦ ʦa pəŋ miŋmin aʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~utaŋ, itija aʦa i **** miħəʦa pakajni "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa ato~u "ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan" patəɬ~ɮo~u kakawa a saso~uwaɾən, saħaʦəʦaj sa a miɾijaŋ. pato~uro~uʡ a miəsəs, nai **** miħəʦa o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u pasi tajwan, pənħo~u "miɾiʡajaw miʦaɾap" o~u aitira i papo~utaɾ no~u tajwan, pənħo~u ko~u kaʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kitakit, nika o~u kaitira no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i ʦo~uŋko~u maɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin ko~unħəko~u itija, kaira no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u o~uja maɾafəɾaj(mapatajaj) a sifo~u, o~urasaka miɾijaŋ to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u tajwan. ***ʦaajħo~u kasətək ko~u paənaran no~u tajwan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u pipatəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦo~uŋko~u paini to~u saso~uwaɾən o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u tajwan sanaj, o~u paənaran ato~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan, o~u nijaħ finawɾan no~u tajwan ko~u mikəto~unaj. ****mikawitaj: ɾin *ħiħo~uŋ (sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj) (**:*** )
